payload.label: faucet
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a brass-colored (gold-toned) metal faucet spout and upper body, vertically oriented and cut off by the crop edge with a small dark top/handle visible; reflective surface with slight wear, appearing photographed at close range (approximately 0.5 m).
